bosses.name: Asgard Guardian (spawnable event)
bosses.note: '<Spectre> A Asgard Guardian has just spawned' — Heimdall/Odin's guard minion can spawn as an announced REALM EVENT, not only inside Asgard.

mechanics: KEY D2 (Runes) MECHANIC: '**Arcane Symbol x 10 consumed, blessing you[r ...]**' — 'Arcane' is one of the 4 rune slots (Arcane/Chrysalis/Impact/Adaptive), so ARCANE SYMBOLS are a rune MATERIAL consumed in batches of 10 to apply a rune 'blessing' (likely Chrysalis/Impact/Adaptive Symbols exist too). Pairs with the NODESTONES found earlier (skill-tree currency) -> Symbols = rune-blessing material, Nodestones = node/skill-tree currency. Also: 'You have analyzed the coin, discovering [...]' (coin-analysis mechanic). Galactic /counter (Pulse 21/x), Mad Jester/Ortar defeats. Trade system ('/trade'). Announcer personas: Snake, Starforce, Djinn, Spectre.
uncertain: 'blessing you...' line tail clipped (likely 'blessing your <slot/rune>'). Pulse counter total (25 or 30) not visible. Whether other Symbol types (Chrysalis/Impact/Adaptive) exist is inferred from the 4-slot design.
confidence: HIGH — Arcane Symbol rune-material mechanic (D2-critical, DOCUMENTED) + fuller Ortar taunts + Asgard Guardian as a spawnable event; biomes documented.
